title: NSIA’s Commitment to Transparency Earns FICAN’s Appreciation - FinancialEDGE
description: The Nigeria Sovereign Investment Authority (NSIA) recently presented its 2024 annual report and accounts in Abuja, bringing together key stakeholders and industry leaders. html:
The Nigeria Sovereign Investment Authority (NSIA) recently presented its 2024 annual report and accounts in Abuja, bringing together key stakeholders and industry leaders.

The event was attended by prominent figures, including Chima Titus Nwokoji, Assistant Business Editor Nigeria Tribune Newspaper / National Chairman of the Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN); Kolawole Owodunni, MD/CEO of NSIA; Aminu Umar-Sadiq, ED/Chief Investment Officer of NSIA; Ijeoma Taylaur, ED/Chief Operating Officer of NSIA; and Bassey Udoh, Chairman of FICAN Abuja.

The presentation of the annual report and accounts highlights the NSIA’s commitment to transparency and accountability in its operations.

The event provided an opportunity for stakeholders to review the authority’s performance and discuss future strategies for driving economic growth and development in Nigeria.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: National Chairman FICAN, Chima Titus Nwokoji, ED & Chief Investment Officer NSIA Kolawole Owodunni MD & CEO NSIA Aminu Umar-Sadiq; ED & Chief Operating Officer NSIA Ijeoma Taylaur; Chairman of FICAN Abuja Bassey Udoh at the presentation of 2024 annual report and accounts of the Nigeria Sovereign Investment Authority in Abuja.
